nasb.text: For thus says the Lord concerning the house of the king of Judah: “You are like Gilead to Me, Like the summit of Lebanon; Yet most assuredly I will make you like a wilderness, Like cities which are not inhabited.

esv.text: For thus says the Lord concerning the house of the king of Judah: “‘You are like Gilead to me, like the summit of Lebanon, yet surely I will make you a desert, an uninhabited city.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華論到猶大王的宮殿這樣說： “雖然在我看來，你好像基列， 好像黎巴嫩的山峰； 我卻要使你變為曠野， 變為無人居住的城市。

ccb.text: 论到犹大王的宫殿，耶和华说： “虽然它在我眼中美如基列， 又像黎巴嫩的山峰， 但我必使它变成不毛之地， 变成杳无人烟的城邑。
